IFCB Shorthand Criteria

Terminology used for rapid morphology checks and mapped to phylogeny color groups.

Color Groups

DiatomSilica frustules, pennate/centric forms
DinoflagellateThecate/unarmored, often motile
CyanobacteriaSmall cells/filaments
CoccolithophoreCalcified plates, small coccoids
MicrozooplanktonCiliates/tintinnids
OtherUnmapped or broad mixed classes

Shape Terms

Pennateelongate / bilateral
Centricradial / circular
Chain-forminglinked cells
HornedTripos-like projections
Thecatearmored plate texture

Size Terms

Pico<2 µm
Nano2–20 µm
Micro20–200 µm
Meso>200 µm

Feature Terms

Area / Biovolumesize proxy
Eccentricityelongation
Solidityedge complexity
Texture entropyinternal heterogeneity
Colors here match the taxonomy colors used in phylogeny-linked IFCB labels.
